info.description: TrueFlow is a modern human resource management (HRM) platform designed to integrate organizational processes, manage teams, control access, and increase organizational productivity.
info.title: TrueFlow Api Document

post.description: Logins the user and returns an access token.
Sends a one-time password (OTP) to the specified phone number.
Verifies OTP, registers the user and returns an access token.

get.description: Returns every active organization membership for the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new organization and makes the caller its owner.

get.description: Returns the business details of an organization.
Returns every role defined for an organization.

post.description: Creates a new role for an organization.

get.description: Returns all permissions grouped by category.
Returns the authenticated user's profile information.

put.description: Creates or updates the authenticated user's profile.
put.summary: Create or update current user's profile

BearerAuth.description: Enter the JWT token with the `Bearer ` prefix
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
